office_does: A state senator writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: An incumbent state representative with an environmental-justice and voting-access record faces a STEM professor whose approved sources contain no detailed platform.

candidates.summary: Anderson is a STEM professor and first-time candidate whose approved sources provide no detailed policy platform.
highlights: Works as a STEM professor at Tacoma Community College [S1]
The approved sources provide no sufficiently detailed policy platform [S1]

candidates.summary: Mena is an incumbent state representative and committee chair whose official work emphasizes environmental justice, access, consumer issues, and affordability.
highlights: Serves as a state representative and House committee chair [S2]
Official work emphasizes environmental justice, voting and language access, and consumer and utility issues [S2]
